|desc={{p|Stoutland}} is Cheren's only known Pokémon. It was first seen battling {{ga|Rosa}}'s {{p|Serperior}} in a Gym battle. Later, it was used to battle several {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s on the [[Plasma Frigate]], alongside {{ga|Nate}}'s {{p|Arcanine}} and [[Hugh]]'s {{p|Samurott}}.

Stoutland's known moves are {{m|Protect}}, {{m|Bite}}, and {{m|Hyper Beam}}.}}
